top_signals.title: Stock splits by listed Japanese firms up for four straight years
top_signals.summary: Companies are attempting to make their shares more affordable for individual investors with limited funds, even as the stock market continues to go up.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
